form.title: Track Your Order
form.description: Regarding the order number format, only fill in the 4 or 5 characters of the order number, xxxx or xxxxx.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.q1: Why can't I find the tracking number after entering the order number and email?
faq.a1: Your order has not yet shipped. It may be on its way to the logistics provider or undergoing customs clearance. The tracking number has not been generated; please wait a moment to obtain it.
faq.q2: Why is there no status for my logistics tracking number?
faq.a2: Once your order is shipped from our warehouse, a tracking number will be generated, so it typically takes about one to two days for the tracking number to update to an online status.
